hooks.command: cmd="$TOOL_INPUT_command"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then msg=$(echo "$cmd" | sed -n 's/.*-m ["'\''"'\'']*\([^"'\'']*\).*/\1/p'); if [ -n "$msg" ]; then if ! echo "$msg" | grep -qE '^(feat|fix|docs|chore|refactor|test|ci): .+'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Commit message must follow conventional format: type: description'; echo 'Allowed types: feat, fix, docs, chore, refactor, test, ci'; exit 2; fi; fi; fi; exit 0
